Bash(# Check if the Dark373 repo has Red Bull, Ferrari, Mercedes, Haas logos
curl -s "https://api.github.com/repos/Dark373/F1-2024-Theme/git/trees/main?recursive=1" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(x['path']\) for x in d.get\('tree',[]\) if \('2024' in x['path'] and \('ferrari' in x['path'].lower\(\) or 'red' in x['path'].lower\(\) or 'mercedes' in x['path'].lower\(\) or 'haas' in x['path'].lower\(\) or 'bull' in x['path'].lower\(\)\)\)]" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(curl -s "https://api.github.com/search/repositories?q=f1+logos+formula1+constructor&sort=stars&per_page=10" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(x['full_name'], x['stargazers_count'], x['default_branch']\) for x in d.get\('items',[]\)]" 2>/dev/null)
